name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Identify media from embedded container tags (ffprobe) before falling back to filename parsing - fixes ripped files whose names lack the show/season. Added configurable import folders so any folder can be auto-organized, with safety excludes for the stream folder, download folder and lost+found.
